items.title: Docs — fill ~530 docstrings (contract/API first) + ADRs (pure text)
items.evidence: Branch tip is c5448ec 'Phase 1C docs'; no Phase 3 docstring commit exists (git log 5c78cc0..HEAD --stat | grep docstring => empty). The 156 files changed on the phase1 branch (git diff --name-only 5c78cc0..HEAD) are all Phase 1 config migration (os.getenv->resolve) plus docs/review_readiness/* Phase-0/1 notes; graph.py etc. show only the resolve() call-site swap. Zero ADRs anywhere: find for adr-*/decision-record/*/adr/* returns nothing; docs/review_readiness/ holds only baseline/config governance notes, no ADR files. interrogate docstring coverage exists only as a report-only CI step, not a completed docstring-fill.
items.gap: No docstring-fill work and no ADRs have been done. 3A is entirely unstarted.

items.title: Flakiness policy BEFORE required CI (N runs/days, quarantine non-governing flaky, define bar, flip report-only->required, + dep hash-pinning + license/secret scanning)
items.evidence: python_ci.yml self-documents it is still Phase 0: line 1 '(Phase 0: REPORT-ONLY)', name 'python-ci (report-only)', line 20 'continue-on-error: true  # PHASE 0: never blocks. Remove when ratcheted to required (Phase 3).' — never flipped to required. No flakiness-policy doc (find -iname '*flak*' hits only unrelated architecture prose; no non-flakiness bar / quarantine list in docs/ or tests/). No dependency hash-pinning: grep -c '--hash=' requirements.lock requirements.txt => 0; lock generated via 'uv pip compile' without hashes. No license/secret scanning: grep for pip-audit|safety|bandit|gitleaks|trufflehog|detect-secrets|license across .github/, .pre-commit-config.yaml, pyproject.toml => empty.
items.gap: CI is still report-only (correctly, per plan gate), but none of the 3B prerequisites exist: no N-run stability evidence, no flakiness bar/quarantine policy, no hash-pinning, no license/secret scanning. 3B unstarted.

items.title: Graph fork removal, fully gated (per-selector compat matrix on 0A-5 fixtures, PG_GRAPH_VERSION usage inventory, ResearchStateV2 migration fixtures, repeated replays, rollback+deprecation)
items.evidence: The fork is fully intact and unmodified as a fork: src/polaris_graph/__init__.py:37 still routes via resolve('PG_GRAPH_VERSION') to v3/v2/v1; graph.py, graph_v2.py (34201B), graph_v3.py (34670B) all still present. The only change to graph_v2.py on the branch is the Phase 1C config swap (MAX_ITERATIONS = int(resolve('PG_V2_MAX_ITERATIONS')) replacing os.getenv), not fork removal. None of the five 3C gates exist: no per-selector compatibility matrix or 0A-5 replay fixtures (found selector *tests* exist e.g. tests/polaris_graph/test_m46_selector_no_bypass.py but these are pre-existing evidence-selector tests, unrelated to the graph-version fork); no PG_GRAPH_VERSION usage inventory (only two incidental doc mentions: docs/pipeline_audit_context/08_env_var_inventory.md and a failure-cases doc); no ResearchStateV2 saved-state migration fixtures; no repeated-replay harness per selector; no rollback/deprecation-window doc. Note: 0A-5 (the 'before' selector fixtures that 3C depends on) also do not appear under baseline/, so the 3C precondition itself is absent.
items.gap: The graph fork is untouched by any removal work and none of the five mandatory 3C gates have been produced. 3C unstarted; its 0A-5 fixture precondition is also absent.

result.area_summary: Phase 3 (docs + required CI + graph fork) has NOT been started. The Phase 1 worktree (branch chore/review-readiness-phase1) tips at c5448ec 'Phase 1C docs'; the entire commit series is Phase 0 (baseline/oracle/CI-report-only/notices) and Phase 1 (config governance + os.getenv->resolve migration). There is no Phase 3 commit. Concretely: (3A) zero docstring-fill work and zero ADRs — find for adr-*/decision-record/*/adr/* returns nothing, and the only docs added are Phase-0/1 review_readiness notes; (3B) python_ci.yml is still explicitly REPORT-ONLY with continue-on-error:true and an inline comment 'Remove when ratcheted to required (Phase 3)', no flakiness-policy/quarantine bar, no dependency hash-pinning (grep --hash= => 0), and no license/secret scanning (no pip-audit/bandit/gitleaks/detect-secrets/etc. in CI, pre-commit, or pyproject); (3C) the graph.py/graph_v2/graph_v3 fork is fully intact — __init__.py still routes on PG_GRAPH_VERSION, the only edit to graph_v2.py is the Phase-1C resolve() swap, and none of the five required gates (per-selector compatibility matrix on 0A-5 fixtures, PG_GRAPH_VERSION usage inventory, ResearchStateV2 migration fixtures, repeated replays, rollback+deprecation window) exist. The 0A-5 selector 'before' fixtures that 3C is gated on also do not appear under baseline/. All three Phase 3 items are MISSING. This is consistent with the plan ordering (Phase 3 is LAST) — work simply has not reached it yet. Relevant paths: /home/polaris/wt/phase1/.github/workflows/python_ci.yml, /home/polaris/wt/phase1/src/polaris_graph/__init__.py, /home/polaris/wt/phase1/src/polaris_graph/graph_v2.py, /home/polaris/wt/phase1/docs/review_readiness/, /home/polaris/wt/phase1/requirements.lock.

items.title: Public-compatibility inventory (dynamic imports, string refs, saved-state refs, external consumers) BEFORE any rename/delete
items.evidence: No compatibility-inventory artifact exists on either review-readiness branch or in /home/polaris/polaris_project. There is no chore/review-readiness-phase2 branch (git branch -a confirms; `git log chore/review-readiness-phase2` => fatal: unknown revision). Searches for *compat*inventory*, *public*compat*, *S2*inventory* under wt/phase1, wt/phase0, polaris_project returned nothing. The docs/*phase2* hits (md3/5/7/9/10/11_phase2_threat_model.md, .codex/PHASE2_GATES.md, .codex/I-gen-002-phase2/*) are all from the UNRELATED older gate/generation initiative, not the review-readiness rename gate. Phase-1 tip is c5448ec (Phase 1C docs); no Phase-2 commit exists.
items.gap: The 2A public-compatibility inventory has not been started. No inventory of importlib/__import__/getattr dynamic imports, string-based refs, saved-state refs, or external consumers exists as a Phase-2 gate artifact. This gate must complete and show nothing depends on a name before 2B may execute.

items.title: Execute NAME_RENAME_WORKLIST_validated.tsv (210 renames by risk class)
items.evidence: The WORKLIST ARTIFACT exists and matches the plan EXACTLY, but is UNVALIDATED-tracked and UNEXECUTED. File /home/polaris/polaris_project/NAME_RENAME_WORKLIST_validated.tsv: 346 lines = 345 data rows + header (cols VERDICT/SAFETY/NAME/LOCATION/KIND/WHY/SUGGESTED/CODEX_ADJUST). VERDICT breakdown: 210 RENAME + 135 KEEP (81 KEEP + 4 KEEP-BUT-NOTED + 50 KEEP-NOTED) — matches plan's '210 renames + 135 KEEP'. RENAME rows by risk class match plan 2B EXACTLY: 105 SAFE, 12 TEXT-ONLY, 45 FILE-RENAME, 32 NEEDS-ALIAS, 16 DOMAIN-REVIEW = 210. HOWEVER: (1) the .tsv is git-status '??' (untracked) in polaris_project and is NOT committed on chore/review-readiness-phase1 or -phase0 (git ls-files shows no worklist/rename file). (2) NO renames executed: SAFE symbol 'OpenAIShimClient' and DOMAIN-REVIEW 'lethal_retrieve' still present in src/ (src/polaris_graph/wiki/mesh/retrieve/lethal.py, qa/ask.py); FILE-RENAME old files still exist unchanged (scripts/_basket_workers_ab_cert.py, _m54_append_contract.py, _v24_compare.py). Zero rename commits on the branch.
items.gap: Worklist is produced and its counts are correct, but NOT committed into the review-readiness branch (lives only as an untracked file in the main project dir), and ZERO of the 210 renames have been executed. None of the 5 execution tiers (SAFE/TEXT-ONLY/FILE-RENAME/NEEDS-ALIAS/DOMAIN-REVIEW) has begun. Also blocked upstream by the missing 2A gate.

items.title: Turn on generation checkpoint (pre-check data only, write gated behind flag, byte-identical normal runs)
items.evidence: Checkpoint infrastructure PRE-EXISTS (not Phase-2 work): src/polaris_graph/checkpoint_manager.py (PG_CHECKPOINT_ENABLED gate at line 26; guards at 176/263/364 return disabled) and src/polaris_graph/generator/generation_snapshot.py. Both files' last FUNCTIONAL change is old gate commit 2b42bc5 (I-deepfix-001, pre-initiative). The ONLY review-readiness touch was dd96ceb (Phase 1C's mechanical os.getenv->resolve() migration), which is Phase-1 work, not 2C. The flag DEFAULTS OFF: config_defaults.py:97 'PG_CHECKPOINT_ENABLED': '0'. No Phase-2 commit modified checkpoint or snapshot code to 'turn on' the checkpoint, add the pre-check-data-only save path, or add the gated-write/reload-reverify behavior described in 2C.
items.gap: 2C has not started. The checkpoint remains disabled by default (the plan's problem #5 'built but never turned on' is still the current state). No Phase-2 work to enable pre-check-data-only saving behind the flag with byte-identical normal runs and a from-scratch reload/re-verify path.

result.area_summary: Phase 2 (compat gate + renames + checkpoint) has NOT STARTED as an executed workstream. There is no chore/review-readiness-phase2 branch, and the phase1 branch tip (c5448ec) is Phase 1C — no Phase-2 commits exist. Every apparent 'phase2' doc found (docs/md*_phase2_threat_model.md, .codex/PHASE2_GATES.md, .codex/I-gen-002-phase2/*) belongs to an unrelated older gate/generation initiative, not this review-readiness Phase 2. THE ONE SUBSTANTIVE ARTIFACT that exists is the rename worklist: /home/polaris/polaris_project/NAME_RENAME_WORKLIST_validated.tsv, and its counts match Plan V4 section 2B EXACTLY — 210 RENAME rows split 105 SAFE / 12 TEXT-ONLY / 45 FILE-RENAME / 32 NEEDS-ALIAS / 16 DOMAIN-REVIEW, plus 135 KEEP rows (81 KEEP + 4 KEEP-BUT-NOTED + 50 KEEP-NOTED). But that file is git-untracked ('??') in the main project dir and is NOT committed to either review-readiness branch. Verdicts: 2A (public-compatibility inventory) = MISSING (no artifact anywhere); 2B (execute renames) = PARTIAL (worklist exists and is correct, but uncommitted to the branch and ZERO of 210 renames executed — original symbols/files verified still present in src/); 2C (turn on checkpoint) = MISSING (checkpoint code pre-exists from old commit 2b42bc5, still defaults PG_CHECKPOINT_ENABLED='0', no Phase-2 change to enable it). graph_v2/v3 correctly out of scope (Plan defers to Phase 3). Net: the 210-name worklist is produced and validated; nothing downstream (inventory gate, rename execution, checkpoint enablement) has begun.
